name: Lush Chorus
explanation: A lush bucket-brigade-style stereo chorus. Short modulated delay lines are read with interpolation and driven by two LFOs in quadrature for a wide image; an Intensity control sweeps from a subtle shimmer to a deep, fast ensemble by scaling rate and depth together, while a dark wet-path low-pass mimics the soft tone of an analogue delay line. Controls: Rate, Depth, Intensity, Mix and Width.
